sentences.target: Ich arbeite vier Tage die Woche.

translations.de: Ich arbeite vier Tage die Woche.
translations.en: I work four days a week.
translations.es: Trabajo cuatro días a la semana.
translations.fr: Je travaille quatre jours par semaine.
translations.ru: Я работаю четыре дня в неделю.
translations.pt: Eu trabalho quatro dias por semana.
translations.vi: Tôi làm việc bốn ngày mỗi tuần.
translations.ar: أنا أعمل أربعة أيام في الأسبوع.
translations.nl: Ik werk vier dagen per week.
translations.uk: Я працюю чотири дні на тиждень.
translations.hi: मैं हफ्ते में चार दिन काम करता हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg jobber fire dager i uken.
translations.sv: Jag jobbar fyra dagar i veckan.
translations.da: Jeg arbejder fire dage om ugen.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; clausal subject.
Finite main verb (Präsens Indikativ, 1. Person Singular); V2 predicate of the clause.
Cardinal numeral modifying 'Tage'; quantifies the duration.
Common noun, plural; accusative measure of time; part of the temporal extent 'vier Tage'.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; determines 'Woche' in the distributive time expression 'die Woche' ('per week').
Common noun, feminine singular accusative; part of an adverbial accusative indicating frequency ('a week').

sentences.target: Diese Woche habe ich viel zu tun.
sentences.reading: /ˈdiːzə ˈvɔxə ˈhaːbə ɪç fiːl tsuː tuːn/

translations.de: Diese Woche habe ich viel zu tun.
translations.ipa: /ˈdiːzə ˈvɔxə ˈhaːbə ɪç fiːl tsuː tuːn/
translations.en: This week I have a lot to do.
translations.es: Esta semana tengo mucho que hacer.
translations.fr: Cette semaine, j'ai beaucoup à faire.
translations.it: Questa settimana ho molto da fare.
translations.yue: 呢個星期我有好多嘢要做。
translations.ru: На этой неделе у меня много дел.
translations.pt: Esta semana tenho muita coisa para fazer.
translations.he: השבוע יש לי הרבה מה לעשות.
translations.tr: Bu hafta yapacak çok işim var.
translations.vi: Tuần này tôi có nhiều việc phải làm.
translations.nl: Deze week heb ik veel te doen.
translations.uk: Цього тижня в мене багато справ.
translations.hu: Ezen a héten sok dolgom van.
translations.hi: इस हफ्ते मेरे पास करने के लिए बहुत कुछ है।
translations.pl: W tym tygodniu mam dużo do zrobienia.
translations.el: Αυτή την εβδομάδα έχω πολλά να κάνω.
translations.nb: Denne uken har jeg mye å gjøre.
translations.id: Minggu ini saya punya banyak hal untuk dilakukan.
translations.sv: Den här veckan har jag mycket att göra.
translations.ro: Săptămâna aceasta am multe de făcut.
translations.da: Denne uge har jeg meget at lave.
translations.fi: Tällä viikolla minulla on paljon tekemistä.
translations.ja: 今週はやることがたくさんあります。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular accusative; modifies 'Woche' in a temporal adverbial NP.
Common noun, feminine singular accusative; fronted temporal adverbial ('this week').
Lexical verb; finite (Präsens Indikativ, 1. Person Singular); main verb in V2 selecting an infinitival complement.
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; post-verbal subject due to V2 word order.
Adverbial quantifier; modifies the infinitival 'zu tun' to indicate a high amount of activity.
Infinitival particle marking the following verb as an infinitive.
Verb in infinitive; complement in the light-verb construction 'viel zu tun haben' ('to have a lot to do').

translations.hi: हफ्ता लगभग खत्म हो गया है।
translations.ja: 今週はもうすぐ終わります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular nominative; determines the subject noun 'Woche'.
Common noun, feminine singular nominative; clausal subject.
Copular auxiliary; finite (Präsens Indikativ, 3. Person Singular); links subject to the predicate.
Degree adverb modifying the predicate 'vorbei'.
Adverb functioning as a predicative complement meaning 'over/past'.

sentences.target: Nächste Woche gehe ich wieder joggen.

translations.de: Nächste Woche gehe ich wieder joggen.
translations.en: I’m going jogging again next week.
translations.es: La próxima semana voy a correr otra vez.
translations.fr: La semaine prochaine, je vais courir encore.
translations.it: La settimana prossima vado di nuovo a correre.
translations.ko: 다음 주에 또 조깅하러 갈 거예요.
translations.ru: На следующей неделе я снова пойду бегать.
translations.pt: Na próxima semana vou correr de novo.
translations.he: בשבוע הבא אני הולך שוב לרוץ.
translations.vi: Tuần sau tôi lại đi chạy bộ.
translations.nl: Volgende week ga ik weer hardlopen.
translations.uk: Наступного тижня я знову піду бігати.
translations.hi: अगले हफ्ते मैं फिर दौड़ने जाऊँगा।
translations.pl: W przyszłym tygodniu znowu pójdę pobiegać.
translations.el: Την επόμενη εβδομάδα θα πάω πάλι για τρέξιμο.
translations.nb: Neste uke skal jeg jogge igen.
translations.id: Minggu depan saya akan joging lagi.
translations.sv: Nästa vecka ska jag jogga igen.
translations.ro: Săptămâna viitoare o să alerg din nou.
translations.da: Næste uge skal jeg ud at løbe igen.
translations.ja: 来週またジョギングに行きます。

tokens.explanation: Attributive adjective, feminine singular accusative; modifies 'Woche' in a temporal adverbial NP; determinative use without article.
Common noun, feminine singular accusative; temporal adverbial ('next week').
Finite main verb (Präsens Indikativ, 1. Person Singular); heads the clause; selects a bare infinitive complement.
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Adverb indicating repetition; modifies the predicate.
Bare infinitive verb; complement to 'gehen' in the construction 'gehen + Infinitiv' meaning 'go jogging'.
